summary: Large closed/unmerged refactor of Mario special-move code. The PR split anonymous ftmario2/3/4/5-style files into named per-special files, renamed many ftMario_func_800Exxxx symbols to semantic SpecialN/S/Hi/Lw names, added Mario-specific state-vars and action-state constants, and propagated the new names into Mario and Dr. Mario action-state assembly tables and cross-file call sites. There were no PR body, review, or comment records in the slice, so intent beyond the refactor/naming evidence is inferred from the diff.
what_changed: Renamed Mario's main source file from src/melee/ft/chara/ftMario/ftmario1.c to src/melee/ft/chara/ftMario/ftmario.c.
Deleted the old numbered Mario special files ftmario2.c and ftmario3.c and moved their contents into named special-move files, especially ftMario_SpecialN.c and ftMario_SpecialS.c.
Renamed ftmario4.c to ftMario_SpecialHi.c and ftmario5.c to ftMario_SpecialLw.c, with additional cleanup and semantic names inside those files.
Updated obj_files.mk so the linker/build order uses ftmario.c plus ftMario_SpecialN.c, ftMario_SpecialS.c, ftMario_SpecialHi.c, and ftMario_SpecialLw.c instead of ftmario1.c through ftmario5.c.

Replaced Mario and Dr. Mario action-state table entries in asm/melee/ft/chara/ftmario.s and asm/melee/ft/chara/ftdrmario.s from raw symbols such as ftMario_func_800E0E18 to named callbacks such as ftMario_SpecialN_Anim, ftMario_SpecialN_IASA, ftMario_SpecialN_Phys, and ftMario_SpecialN_Coll.

Renamed cross-file assembly references: ftMario_func_800E0D1C became ftMario_SpecialN_VitaminRandom; ftMario_func_800E132C became ftMario_SpecialS_SetNULL; ftMario_func_800E1428 became ftMario_SpecialS_CheckItemCapeRemove.

Expanded ftmario.h with an ftMarioAction enum defining AS_MARIO_SPECIALN through AS_MARIO_SPECIALAIRLW and with named action-state change flag macros FTMARIO_SPECIALS_COLL_FLAG and FTMARIO_SPECIALLW_COLL_FLAG.

Renamed fields in ftMarioAttributes from generic x04/x08/etc. to move-specific names such as x4_MARIO_CAPE_VEL_X, x18_MARIO_SUPERJUMP_FREEFALL_MOBILITY, x3C_MARIO_TORNADO_MOMENTUM_X_GROUND, and x60_MARIO_CAPE_REFLECTION.

Added src/melee/ft/chara/ftMario/ftMario_StateVars.h with ftMarioSpecialS, ftMarioSpecialLw, and ftMarioStateVars; wired it into ftstatevars.h and fighter.h via a new marioVars union at fighter offset 0x2340.
Renamed Mario per-fighter special fields in fighter.h from generic x222C/x2230/x2234/x2238/x223C to x222C_vitaminCurr, x2230_vitaminPrev, x2234_tornadoCharge, x2238_isCapeBoost, and x223C_capeGObj.
Replaced several hard-coded numeric action-state IDs and flags in the moved code with AS_MARIO_* constants, FTMARIO_* flag macros, BOOL/FALSE, and HSD_BUTTON_B.
Added a new src/dolphin/base/PPCArch.h header defining GQR0-GQR7 and prototypes for PPCHalt, PPCMfhid2, and PPCMthid2.
smart_moves: The refactor kept the action-state table layout intact while only swapping symbol names, making the semantic rename easy to audit against Mario and Dr. Mario's shared tables.
Splitting SpecialN, SpecialS, SpecialHi, and SpecialLw into separate source files matches the organization already used by other fighters and makes future per-move decomp work easier to search.
Adding an ftMarioAction enum removed magic action-state IDs like 0x157-0x15E from the refactored code and made state changes self-documenting.
Promoting x2340 state storage into ftMarioStateVars documents which overlapping state fields belong to Cape reflection versus Tornado momentum/collision behavior.
Renaming SpecialAttrs_Mario fields with move-prefixed names preserved original offsets while recording inferred meaning directly in the struct.
The assembly callsite updates show a safe rename pattern: rename the C symbol, then update all asm references and action-state table pointers in the same PR.
decomp_lessons: For fighter refactors, preserve offsets and table order while introducing semantic names; this keeps matching risk localized to symbol/linkage changes.
When a character shares callbacks with a clone, update both character action-state tables together; this PR updates both ftmario.s and ftdrmario.s for Mario special callbacks.
Per-move source files are a useful decomp organization boundary for fighters because Anim/IASA/Phys/Coll callbacks can be grouped with the start actions and transition helpers they depend on.
State vars at fighter offset 0x2340 should be modeled as character-specific unions rather than reused generic x2340/x2344 names once their meaning is known.
Header refactors should include both semantic field names and offset comments so future matching work can verify layout while benefiting from readable names.
Cross-system references from item or fighter asm can depend on character callback symbols; rename passes should grep asm as well as C headers/sources.
naming_conventions: Mario callbacks were normalized to ftMario_Special<Move>_<Phase>, for example ftMario_SpecialN_Anim, ftMario_SpecialAirN_IASA, ftMario_SpecialS_Phys, and ftMario_SpecialAirLw_Coll.
Ground and air variants use SpecialN versus SpecialAirN, SpecialS versus SpecialAirS, SpecialHi versus SpecialAirHi, and SpecialLw versus SpecialAirLw.
Action-state constants use AS_MARIO_* names, such as AS_MARIO_SPECIALN and AS_MARIO_SPECIALAIRLW.
Action-state change flag macros use FTMARIO_*_COLL_FLAG names, such as FTMARIO_SPECIALS_COLL_FLAG and FTMARIO_SPECIALLW_COLL_FLAG.
Mario attribute fields keep the original offset prefix but add descriptive move-specific suffixes, such as x4_MARIO_CAPE_VEL_X and x54_MARIO_TORNADO_TAP_Y_VEL_MAX.
Mario per-fighter special fields preserve offset prefixes and add meaning, for example x222C_vitaminCurr, x2234_tornadoCharge, and x223C_capeGObj.
Mario state-vars structs use ftMarioSpecialS, ftMarioSpecialLw, and a union named ftMarioStateVars with members SpecialS and SpecialLw.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Updated .4byte entries in as_table_mario and as_table_drmario from raw ftMario_func_800Exxxx symbols to the new semantic callback names without changing the table sequence.
Updated assembly branch-and-link annotations in asm/melee/ft/code_800877F8.s and asm/melee/it/code_8027CF30.s to match renamed C symbols.
Kept original offset-style prefixes in struct field names to protect layout reasoning while adding semantic suffixes.
Used inline helper cleanup in ftMario_SpecialHi.c, renaming _ftMario_func_800E1BE4_and_800E1D2C to ftMario_SpecialHi_CalcAngle.
Replaced raw button mask 0x200 with HSD_BUTTON_B in the Tornado code, improving readability without changing apparent input behavior.
Introduced named action-state constants and flag macros to avoid repeating magic numbers in Fighter_ActionStateChange_800693AC calls.
follow_up_queries: Why was PR #446 closed without merge, and was the ftMario refactor resubmitted in a later PR?
Search later history for ftMario_StateVars.h or ftMario_SpecialS.c to see which naming choices survived review.
Check whether duplicate declaration ftMario_SpecialS_ExitHitlag appears in later cleaned headers.
Compare later Mario and Dr. Mario action-state tables for the same SpecialN/S/Hi/Lw callback naming pattern.
Search for PPCArch.h introduction in later PRs to confirm whether this header was accepted separately.
